projects.name: Argus
projects.tagline: AI-powered GitHub Action for automated PR review

recruiterBullets.problem: PR reviews are slow, inconsistent, and routinely miss severity issues under time pressure.
recruiterBullets.feature: A zero-config GitHub Action that reviews every PR with Llama 3.3 70B — posting inline comments with severity classification and a risk summary table.
recruiterBullets.impact: Deployed to HireOS and School ERP repos. Every PR now gets a severity-classified review in under 60 seconds.

projects.problem: Teams merge bugs and security gaps because human reviewers are overloaded and inconsistent — a critical auth issue looks identical to a minor formatting note.
projects.solution: Built Argus: a GitHub Action that triggers on every pull request, sends the diff to Groq's Llama 3.3 70B, and posts inline comments classified as HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW severity with a risk summary table on every PR.
projects.impact: Integrated into HireOS and School ERP. 100% of PRs now receive a structured AI review in under 60 seconds. Zero HIGH-severity issues have slipped through since deployment.
highlights: Zero-config YAML setup — add to any repo in one file
Inline PR comments with HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW severity labels
Risk summary table posted as a PR comment on every review
Built on Groq's Llama 3.3 70B for sub-60s review latency

projects.name: Hire_OS
projects.tagline: AI hiring operating system — job post to offer letter

recruiterBullets.problem: Recruiting teams juggle spreadsheets, email threads, and disconnected ATS tools — top candidates fall through the cracks.
recruiterBullets.feature: Unified platform with AI-assisted screening, pipeline visualization, and real-time team collaboration.
recruiterBullets.impact: 40% faster time-to-screen; centralized candidate data; full-funnel visibility for hiring managers.

projects.problem: Recruiting teams juggle fragmented tools — spreadsheets, email threads, and disconnected ATS workflows slow hiring and lose top candidates.
projects.solution: Built a unified hiring OS with AI-assisted screening, pipeline visualization, and collaborative workflows — one platform from job post to offer.
projects.impact: Reduced time-to-screen by 40%, centralized candidate data, and gave hiring managers real-time visibility across the entire funnel.
highlights: End-to-end pipeline from job posting to offer letter

projects.name: School ERP
projects.tagline: Full-stack school management system — attendance to fees

recruiterBullets.problem: Schools ran on paper records and spreadsheets — data loss, miscommunication, and manual overhead.
recruiterBullets.feature: Role-based ERP with modules for attendance, grades, fees, and parent-teacher communication.
recruiterBullets.impact: Digitized core ops for a live institution; eliminated paper-based data loss; improved parent communication.

projects.problem: Schools relied on paper records and disconnected software for attendance, fees, and academics — leading to data loss and communication gaps.
projects.solution: Delivered a modular ERP with role-based dashboards for admins, teachers, students, and parents — deployed for a real institution.
projects.impact: Digitized core operations, eliminated paper-based data loss, and improved parent-teacher communication at a live school.
highlights: Role-based dashboards: admin, teacher, student, parent
Modules for attendance, grades, fees, and communication
Deployed and used by a real institution

projects.name: MindBridge AI
projects.problem: Architects struggle to parse complex zoning laws and building codes during the initial design phase, leading to costly revisions.
projects.solution: Building an AI-powered assistant that ingests local building codes and provides real-time compliance checks against architectural plans.
projects.impact: Expected to reduce compliance-related revisions by 60% and accelerate the initial design phase for architectural firms.
highlights: RAG pipeline for navigating complex local zoning laws
Interactive compliance checking via conversational interface
